case_title: ECONOMY RESTAURANT FIXTURES INC VS ROBUCK MITCHEL A.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $821.71 FILED BY ECONOMY RESTAURANT FIXTURES INC AS TO DEFENDANT ROBUCK MITCHEL A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-15-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ROBUCK MITCHEL A.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ECONOMY RESTAURANT FIXTURES INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROBUCK MITCHEL A. $821.71 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $881.71 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ROBUCK MITCHEL A.
